hero.eyebrow: Mineral Intelligence at the Loading Face
hero.headline: We eliminate fine copper loss before it ever leaves the shovel.
hero.subheadline: SpectraFlow AI transforms every loading unit into a real-time mineralogical classification node, resolving the most critical bottleneck in large-scale mining: the low resolution of short-term block models at lithological contact zones.
hero.badge: Stand-off LIBS · Edge Computing · On-Demand ML

pain.headline: The Dispatch System operates blind.
pain.intro: At lithological contacts, the low resolution of short-term block models generates systematic classification errors. The outcome is irreversible: high-grade ore routed directly to waste dumps.

problems.title: Degraded block model resolution
problems.desc: Geological model resolution at interface zones is insufficient to support real-time dispatch decisions.

problems.title: Blind dispatch at the face
problems.desc: The dispatch system assigns destinations without in-situ mineralogical classification, propagating error all the way to the plant.

problems.title: Deteriorated Mine-Plant reconciliation
problems.desc: F2 deviation exceeds acceptable operational ranges, compromising both short- and medium-term planning.

problems.title: Unquantified fine copper loss
problems.desc: Misclassified ore reaching the waste dump represents a direct and permanent economic loss, invisible in standard operational reports.

solutions.title: Stand-off LIBS scanner on the boom
solutions.desc: High-resolution laser-induced plasma spectroscopy mounted on the equipment boom. Zero contact, zero abrasion, zero impact on physical availability.

solutions.title: Edge Computing node in the cabin
solutions.desc: Embedded processing of spectral signatures using proprietary Machine Learning models. On-demand activation when positioning the bucket: no network latency, no system saturation.

solutions.title: Instant Oxide / Sulfide classification
solutions.desc: Real-time mineralogical discrimination before the material leaves the face. Dispatch receives the correct signal for every blast.

solutions.title: F2 KPI stabilization
solutions.desc: Mine-Plant reconciliation stabilizes below 2%, aligning the operational block model with the reality of the mining face.

how.headline: The shovel as a real-time analytical node.
how.subheadline: Four steps that turn every loaded bucket into an informed mineralogical decision before the haul truck departs.
how.footnote: Stand-off: no contact with the ore · Edge ML: no cloud latency · Integrated with Dispatch via REST/MQTT API.

s1.title: Nd:YAG Laser Pulse
s1.desc: Q-switched laser >100 mJ fired in stand-off mode at 5–8 m. Zero contact with the ore, zero impact on shovel availability.

s2.title: Plasma & ICCD
s2.desc: The pulse creates a micro-plasma on the ore surface. The gated ICCD spectrometer captures the Cu, Fe and S spectral signature in microseconds.

s3.title: ML Edge · Jetson AGX Orin
s3.desc: 275 TOPS of AI power process the spectrum with the proprietary ML model in <500 ms. No cloud latency, no mine network saturation.

s4.title: Dispatch Alert
s4.desc: The mineralogical classification reaches Wenco Fleet Control via API before the haul truck starts its route. F2 stabilized below 2%.

tech.headline: Industrial-grade mining hardware. Proprietary software.
tech.subheadline: Each component specified in detail to support the extreme operating conditions on a large-tonnage shovel.

metrics.headline: Results that impact the operational balance.

items.label: F2 Deviation
items.desc: Stabilization of Mine-Plant reconciliation within operational excellence ranges.

items.label: Tons per Day
items.desc: Mineralogical processing and classification capacity validated in large-scale operations.

items.label: Physical Availability
items.desc: Stand-off operation with no ore contact: the loading equipment does not modify its productive cycle.

financials.headline: The ROI that justifies the decision this week.
financials.subheadline: Three scenarios quantified with the same methodology: 100,000 t/day, 12% at contact zone, 0.65% Cu, 8% discount rate, Cu price USD 8,500/t.
financials.footnote: * Financial model validated against the declared operational case. Each assumption is empirically verified during Phase 0 of the pilot.

fleet.headline: What it costs to instrument the entire fleet.
fleet.subheadline: R&D and the ML model are amortized in the pilot. Each additional shovel pays only for hardware + installation + adaptation.
fleet.footnote: * Base scenario · 50% FP reduction · USD 3M/year per shovel · 8% discount rate · ~10% volume discount on Chinese components from module 3+.

roadmap.headline: 12 months, two decision gates, bounded risk.
roadmap.subheadline: Stage-gate structure designed to minimize exposure: if Gate 1 fails, the learning cost is USD 150K. If it passes, the full pilot ROI is < 2 months.

p0.title: Phase 0 — Lab Validation
p0.desc: Equipment procurement, drill core sampling campaign, bench integration and ML model v1 training at the Antofagasta lab.

g1.title: Gate 1 — Go/No-Go
g1.desc: Technical criteria: accuracy >80% in lab, latency <500 ms demonstrated, ICCD stable >48 h continuous.

p1.title: Phase 1 — Pilot on Shovel
p1.desc: Full ruggedization, mechanical installation on boom, integration with Wenco Dispatch, 6-month operational pilot with real KPI measurement.

g2.title: Gate 2 — Fleet Scale
g2.desc: Business criteria: >40% FP reduction demonstrated, F2 <2% sustained for 3 months, >85% availability during operational shift.

totals.label: Total pilot investment
totals.value: USD 430,000 (Phase 0: USD 150K + Phase 1: USD 280K) · R&D and the ML model are amortized here. Additional modules for fleet scale-up: USD 175K–210K per shovel.

haas.headline: We don't sell sensors. We sell KPI stability.
haas.subheadline: Our HaaS (Hardware as a Service) model removes the CAPEX entry barrier and aligns our profitability exclusively with the operational performance of your site.

cards.title: Zero CAPEX
cards.desc: All industrial mining-grade OEM hardware is included in the service. No upfront investment, no asset depreciation, no technology obsolescence risk for the operation.

cards.title: Data-as-a-Service
cards.desc: Flat operating fee per instrumented shovel, tied to real-time mineralogical classification and guaranteed Edge node availability. Full financial predictability.

cards.title: Success Fee
cards.desc: Success bonus indexed exclusively to fine copper recovery and F2 KPI compliance. If you do not recover value, we do not charge the differential.
cards.highlight: Aligned with F2 KPI and Cu recovery

traffic.headline: Intelligent Mining Traffic Control.
traffic.subheadline: Real-time traffic management system for the full fleet: congestion prediction, optimal routing and intersection control with production-priority logic.

f1.title: Real-time traffic visibility
f1.desc: High-precision RTK GPS (<2 cm) on all equipment + fixed sensors (LiDAR + AI camera) at critical intersections and ramps. From reactive to proactive.

f2.title: ML-powered congestion prediction
f2.desc: Digital twin of the haul road network with an ML model that anticipates bottlenecks before they occur, enabling dynamic routing by productive cycle.

f3.title: Smart traffic lights at intersections
f3.desc: Dynamic signaling and right-of-way control integrated with the production priorities engine. Equipment on the critical cycle gets verifiable priority.

f4.title: Integration with existing FMS
f4.desc: Integrates with the current Dispatch (Wenco, Modular Mining, Cat MineStar) via API. Does not replace infrastructure: it empowers it with additional intelligence.

team.headline: Geology, data and systems. One team.

members.name: Miguel Giuliano
members.bio: Specialist in applied geometallurgy and short-term block modeling. Architect of the SpectraFlow AI analytical workflow and responsible for field validation.

members.name: Cristian Jara
members.bio: Developer of the proprietary spectral classification algorithms in Python. Responsible for training, validation and deployment of ML models on the Edge node.

members.name: Giovanni Giuliano
members.bio: Architect of hardware-software integration in industrial mining environments. Responsible for the Edge node design, Dispatch system interface, and operational system robustness.

ecosystem.headline: End-to-end solutions for the mining-metallurgical value chain.
ecosystem.subheadline: SpectraFlow AI is the spearhead of an ecosystem of four business units designed to solve bottlenecks at every step of the process.

units.title: Mine-to-Mill Reconciliation & Geostatistics
units.desc: Proprietary Python scripts (DHSA) for volumetric reconciliation, applied geostatistics and estimation error management in the long-term block model.

units.title: Surface Engineering & Robotics — Ablatech
units.desc: High-precision industrial laser cleaning and drone systems for inspection and maintenance of surface assets. Ablation technology without abrasives or solvents.

units.title: Chemical & Process Optimization
units.desc: Formulation and supply of advanced mining reagents for the optimization of flotation and leaching circuits. Focus on metallurgical recovery and reagent cost reduction.
